summary: Tested new Impresos tab in Evaluaciones (FRUVECO). Both backend and frontend round-trips PASSED. Created/edited evaluación with Impresos via UI; all 6 sections render, all data-testids present, header auto-fills from parcela and is editable, save persists, edit re-hydrates all values correctly. Backend pytest also passes (POST→GET→PUT→GET).

issues: Multiple React hydration warnings (span as child of <select>, <th>, <tr>, <tbody>) from x-ve-dynamic injection wrapping - not related to Impresos tab but visible in console

critical_code_review_comments: Evaluaciones.js is ~620 lines and could be split (low priority).
Hardcoded Spanish toast strings ('Evaluación creadoa correctamente') contain a typo ('creadoa') - reused across multiple unrelated success notifications (cosmetic).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 evaluación via UI (cleaned up by edit overwriting); backend test cleans up via DELETE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Impresos tab works end-to-end. Backend EvaluacionCreate already includes impresos: Dict; create/update persist it. Frontend uses DEFAULT_IMPRESOS + mergeImpresos. All 30 expected data-testids verified. Auto-fill works (proveedor, codigo_plantacion, cultivo, superficie). Edit roundtrip verified (comentarios, finca, vaso, lote, serie, obs all persisted).
